title: You need a work permit - Canada.ca
content:
## You need a work permit A rural community immigration pilot applicant needs a work
    permit
If you applied to the Rural
        Community Immigration Pilot (RCIP) , you need a work permit to work in Canada.
Based on your answer, you may be eligible for a 2-year employer-specific
    work permit . You must also meet
the general
    eligibility requirements for a work permit.

## Work permits for spouses or common-law partners
Your spouse or common-law
    partner can apply for an open
    work permit at the same time as you apply for your 2-year work permit.
Their work permit will only let them work in the same community as you.
